name: Rib Primal
description: Premium rib primal cut with excellent marbling and bone structure. Perfect for high-end steaks, roasts, or specialty cuts. Delivers exceptional flavor and tenderness.

name: Rib Blade Meat
description: Tender blade meat from the rib section. Ideal for steaks, roasting, or grinding. Offers great flavor with good marbling throughout.

name: Roast Ready Short Cut
description: Pre-trimmed roast cut ready for immediate preparation. Perfect for oven roasting or slow cooking. Consistent quality and excellent presentation.

name: Ribeye
description: Premium ribeye steak with excellent marbling and flavor. One of the most sought-after cuts. Perfect for grilling or pan-searing to perfection.

name: Chuck Shoulder Clod
description: Lean shoulder cut from the chuck. Excellent for roasting, grinding, or stewing. Versatile cut with good flavor and minimal waste.

name: Chuck Square Cut
description: Square-cut chuck section. Perfect for braising, stewing, or grinding. Great for ground beef applications and slow-cooked dishes.

name: Brisket Point Cut Boneless
description: Boneless brisket point cut. Ideal for smoking, braising, or slow roasting. Rich marbling creates tender, flavorful results when cooked low and slow.

name: Inside Skirt
description: Tender inside skirt steak. Excellent for grilling or pan-searing. Flavorful cut with great texture when sliced against the grain.

name: Plate Outside Skirt
description: Flavorful outside skirt from the plate section. Perfect for grilling, fajitas, or stir-fry. Tender when properly cooked and sliced.

name: Short Ribs
description: Meaty short ribs with excellent bone-to-meat ratio. Perfect for braising, smoking, or slow roasting. Creates rich, flavorful dishes.

name: Chuck Short Rib
description: Short rib cut from the chuck section. Ideal for braising or slow cooking. Tender meat with great flavor from the bone.

name: Striploin Boneless
description: Premium boneless striploin steak. Lean with excellent tenderness. Perfect for grilling, pan-searing, or roasting. Consistent quality.

name: Tenderloin
description: The most tender cut of beef. Premium quality for special occasions. Excellent for grilling, roasting, or pan-searing. Cooks quickly and stays juicy.

name: Tenderloin Side Muscle
description: Side muscle from the tenderloin. Tender and lean. Perfect for premium steaks or specialty preparations. Consistent quality throughout.

name: Butt Defatted
description: Lean butt cut with excess fat removed. Ideal for roasting or grinding. Great for health-conscious preparations while maintaining flavor.

name: Tenderloin Butt
description: Tender butt section from the tenderloin. Premium cut with excellent tenderness. Perfect for steaks or specialty roasts.

name: Chuck Square Cut
description: Square-cut chuck section. Versatile for braising, stewing, or grinding. Great for ground beef and slow-cooked preparations.

name: Flank Steak
description: Lean, flavorful flank steak. Perfect for grilling, fajitas, or stir-fry. Tender when sliced against the grain. Great for marinating.

name: Aorta
description: Beef aorta. Unique organ meat with distinct texture. Used in specialty cuisines and traditional dishes. Requires proper preparation.

name: Diaphragm Membrane
description: Diaphragm muscle membrane. Specialty cut with unique flavor profile. Excellent for braising or specialty culinary applications.

name: Hearts
description: Beef hearts. Lean, flavorful organ meat. Perfect for grinding into sausages, stewing, or specialty preparations. Tender when cooked properly.

name: Kidneys
description: Beef kidneys. Delicate organ meat with unique flavor. Excellent for stews, pâtés, or traditional kidney dishes. Requires proper preparation.

name: Liver
description: Beef liver. Nutrient-dense organ meat with rich flavor. Excellent for pâtés, sautéing, or traditional liver dishes. Premium quality.

name: Tongue
description: Beef tongue. Delicacy in many cuisines. Tender when properly prepared. Excellent for braising, boiling, or specialty dishes.
